items.text: OS_alphabetAR and OS_trainingAR show zero performance at easiest difficulty despite high adherence—minutes may be non-therapeutic.

checkin.wins: You kept showing up and your Balloons AR stayed steady even when it got a bit more challenging. Saturday looked like your strongest push across the set.
checkin.to_improve: Try slipping in a quick Shelves AR round early in the session so it doesn’t get skipped.
checkin.check_in: I see you’ve been working through a lot of pain—if it’s flaring, it’s okay to go lighter and tell your care team.
